title: VendorPrequalification
description: An application by a firm to become an SCA-prequalified vendor (or to renew/add a trade) — the everyday vendor onboarding transaction. NET-NEW: there is NO public API for prequalification. SCA publishes the RESULTING roster ('Prequalified Firms' szkz-syh6) as Open Data, but the act of applying happens only through PDF forms and the login-walled bidset SharePoint portal. This schema serves both the write surface (submit an application) and the read surface (track an application's status).

applicationId.description: Server-assigned prequalification application number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Application lifecycle status. Set by SCA, not the applicant.

vendorName.description: Legal name of the applying firm.

requestType.description: Whether this is a new prequalification, a renewal, an added trade, or a reinstatement after disqualification.

tradeCode.description: Master Trade Code the firm is applying to be prequalified in.

certifications.description: Self-declared business certifications, subject to SCA/city verification.

attachments.description: Supporting documents (financials, references, licenses) uploaded with the application.
